archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) combined with functional Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for data clarity

login.layout: Screen background should use background color, large bold typography for welcome. Input fields should be generously spaced. Primary button for login.

principal_dashboard.layout: Use a Bento Grid style. Row of summary cards (Total Students, Total Teachers) using accent colors. Followed by a FlatList of recent activities or quick links.

teacher_dashboard.layout: Personalized greeting. Quick actions row (Enter Marks, Take Attendance). Section for assigned classes using Card components.

class_management.layout: FlatList of classes and sections. Each item should be a touchable Card showing class name, class teacher, and student count.

chat.layout: Standard chat interface. Messages list using FlatList. Differentiate sender/receiver with primary vs surface bubble backgrounds. Use safe area for input box.

login_background.description: Abstract colorful background for the login screen top half or background.

school_building.description: Modern school building for dashboard headers or about section.

teacher_avatar_1.description: Teacher portrait for profile or chat.

teacher_avatar_2.description: Teacher portrait for profile or chat.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is a React Native Expo application. DO NOT use HTML elements (div, span, etc.). DO NOT use Tailwind CSS classes.
Use ONLY React Native components: View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList, TextInput, Image.
Use StyleSheet.create() for all styling, following the spacing and color tokens defined in this JSON.
Navigation MUST use expo-router file-based routing. Define tabs in a (tabs) layout.
Authentication: JWT logic must be implemented correctly, distinguishing between Teacher and Principal roles.
For icons, use @expo/vector-icons (e.g., Ionicons, Feather). DO NOT attempt to install lucide-react or HTML-based SVG icons.
Include 'testID' (React Native equivalent of data-testid) on all interactive elements: buttons, inputs, list items.
Cards and sections must utilize the generous spacing provided in the radii and padding rules.
Avoid generic center alignment for heavy data. Left-align text and lists for scanability.
